info.title: Industrial Lathe Tools API

post.description: Register a new user account (optionally disabled in production).
Authenticate with phone number (username) and password; returns a JWT.

post.summary: Revoke refresh tokens and invalidate access tokens
Verify admin PIN for destructive actions
post.description: Exchange a valid admin PIN for a short-lived step-up token.

parameters.name: is_deleted

schema.description: Filter soft-deleted products (admin only when true)

parameters.description: Filter soft-deleted products (admin only when true)

parameters.description: JSON object for specification filters, e.g. {"technical_specs.range":"0-150mm"}

post.summary: Add a product image by URL or multipart upload

get.summary: List all categories (flat, with depth metadata)
get.description: Return every category with depth, leaf flag, and breadcrumb for admin filtering.

delete.summary: Delete a category with product reassignment
delete.description: Delete a leaf category and reassign its products per depth rules (requires step-up PIN).

get.description: Return the category hierarchy as a nested tree (max 3 product-assignable layers).

schema.title: Response Get Category Tree Api V1 Categories Tree Get

get.summary: Public feature key to Persian label map (storefront)
get.description: Cacheable mapping for storefront specification labels.

get.summary: Available technical specification filter values for a category
Get specification template for an assignable leaf category
get.description: Return the 3-part JSONB template (tech specs, features, dimensions) for product entry.
Return all brands ordered by name (used by admin product forms).

schema.title: Response Merge Cart Api V1 Cart Merge Post

post.summary: Refund a paid order via gateway

get.description: Liveness probe — returns 200 when the process is running.
Readiness probe — verifies database (and Redis when configured).

is_selectable.title: Is Selectable
is_selectable.description: True only when depth==3 and the category is a leaf node

default_values.description: Pre-filled specification object matching the admin form shape

note.title: Note
note.description: Admin annotation stored in admin_note (does not overwrite customer note)

OrderTrackingResponse.title: OrderTrackingResponse
OrderTrackingResponse.description: Minimal, non-sensitive projection for public order tracking.

ProductCreate.title: ProductCreate
ProductCreate.description: Validated payload for creating a new product.

ProductDetailResponse.title: ProductDetailResponse
ProductDetailResponse.description: Full PDP shape including images, specifications, and computed stock fields.

ProductSummaryResponse.title: ProductSummaryResponse
ProductSummaryResponse.description: PLP card shape returned by GET /products.

ProductUpdate.title: ProductUpdate
ProductUpdate.description:
Partial update payload; omitted fields are left unchanged.

Explicit null on required string columns (sku, name) is rejected
to prevent IntegrityError at the database layer. category_id may be
omitted on PATCH (leave unchanged) but cannot be cleared to null.

StockStatusResponse.title: StockStatusResponse
StockStatusResponse.description: Admin stock snapshot. stock_status uses English codes: in_stock | low_stock | out_of_stock.
